TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: I 1966 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 6 a romi'ad masofoc ci Faure Gnassingbé , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Togo anini i ci Faure Gnassingbé, patirengan a romi'ad i 2005 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 4 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi fao~u~urə *nassiŋb~b~v* , maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u to~u*o~u anini i ʦi fao~u~urə *nassiŋb~b~v*, patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: I 1966 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 6 a romi'ad masofoc ci Faure Gnassingbé , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Togo anini i ci Faure Gnassingbé, patirengan a romi'ad i 2005 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 4 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi fao~u~urə *nassiŋb~b~v* , maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u to~u*o~u anini i ʦi fao~u~urə *nassiŋb~b~v*, patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ.
